requirements.summary: Create ticket purchase functionality in the frontend interface
acceptanceCriteria: Users can purchase tickets through the frontend interface
Each ticket is assigned a unique identifier
Purchase confirmation is displayed to users

file_operations.description: Create ticket purchase component with buy button that calls backend buyTicket method using authenticated user ID, displays ticket ID confirmation, and handles loading/error states
Import and render TicketPurchase component in the main app layout

requirements.summary: Build lottery drawing results display in frontend
acceptanceCriteria: Drawing results are displayed to users
Results are accessible through the interface

file_operations.description: Create drawing results component to display lottery outcomes, winner information, and round details with appropriate visual styling
Import and render DrawingResults component in the main app layout

requirements.summary: Create results viewing interface displaying lottery outcomes and history
acceptanceCriteria: Users can view current lottery status
Winning ticket numbers are displayed clearly
User's own tickets and wins are highlighted

file_operations.description: Create component that fetches and displays user's purchased tickets using getAllTicketsByUser backend method, highlighting winning tickets and showing ticket IDs
Create lottery history component displaying past drawing rounds, winning ticket numbers, and historical outcomes in a chronological list
Import and render MyTickets and LotteryHistory components in the main app layout

requirements.summary: Design vibrant lottery-themed visual interface with playful aesthetics
acceptanceCriteria: Consistent visual theme across all lottery interfaces
Engaging color scheme that evokes lottery excitement
Clear typography for numbers and ticket information
Lottery-themed UI elements and visual motifs

file_operations.description: Define lottery color palette with vibrant primary colors (golden yellows, lottery greens, prize reds), number display typography using bold fonts, and lottery-themed CSS custom properties for consistent theming
Extend Tailwind theme with lottery-specific colors, custom font families for ticket numbers, and animation utilities for exciting visual effects
Create reusable ticket card component with lottery ticket visual motif, number grid display, and ticket-style border decorations for use across ticket displays

requirements.summary: Integrate generated lottery-themed images as static assets
acceptanceCriteria: Generated images are placed in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
Images are referenced correctly in React components
Assets load properly in the application

file_operations.description: Add lottery ticket illustration image from frontend/public/assets/generated/lottery-ticket.dim_400x250.png as visual decoration in the ticket purchase interface
Display winner trophy icon from frontend/public/assets/generated/winner-trophy.dim_128x128.png when showing winning results
Set background pattern using lottery-bg.dim_1920x1080.png from frontend/public/assets/generated/lottery-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as main interface background
